scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:backend" "npm -w @finance/desktop run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:8080/api/health http://localhost:5173 && npm -w @finance/desktop run electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:desktop
scripts.lint: npm -w @finance/backend run lint && npm -w @finance/desktop run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @finance/backend run typecheck && npm -w @finance/desktop run typecheck
